# Copilot / LLM Instructions

Before contributing to this repository, read the root [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md).
It contains the canonical LLM contributor guidance for PacketYeeter, including:

- build and test commands,
- Linux/eBPF limitations,
- detection and enforcement safety rules,
- documentation expectations,
- PR checklist items, and
- attribution guidance for substantial LLM-assisted commits.

Keep changes focused, validate with the narrowest relevant tests, and be explicit
about any Linux/eBPF checks that cannot run on the current machine.
